query:
SELECT 
  o.orderNo,
  o.customerName,
  o.deliveryCity,
  o.courseAmount,
  o.teacherFee,
  o.transportFee,
  o.partnerFee,
  c.partnerFeeRate,
  ROUND((CAST(o.courseAmount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(o.teacherFee AS DECIMAL(10,2))) * CAST(c.partnerFeeRate AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 100, 2) AS expectedPartnerFee
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN cityPartnerConfig c ON o.deliveryCity = c.city
WHERE o.orderNo IN ('ORD1767678237511535', 'ORD1767678237410451', 'ORD1767678216755702', 'ORD1767678216720813')
ORDER BY o.orderNo;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT 
  o.orderNo,
  o.customerName,
  o.deliveryCity,
  o.courseAmount,
  o.teacherFee,
  o.transportFee,
  o.partnerFee,
  c.partnerFeeRate,
  ROUND((CAST(o.courseAmount AS DECIMAL(10,2)) - CAST(o.teacherFee AS DECIMAL(10,2))) * CAST(c.partnerFeeRate AS DECIMAL(10,2)) / 100, 2) AS expectedPartnerFee
FROM orders o
LEFT JOIN cityPartnerConfig c ON o.deliveryCity = c.city
WHERE o.orderNo IN ('ORD1767678237511535', 'ORD1767678237410451', 'ORD1767678216755702', 'ORD1767678216720813')
ORDER BY o.orderNo;
